channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Swift (All-time)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Swift nel periodo all-time.

item.title: 📝 jaywcjlove/awesome-mac (104598 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jaywcjlove

📝 Repository: jaywcjlove/awesome-mac

📄 Descrizione:  This project is dedicated to collecting high-quality macOS software and organizing them systematically by different categories for easy search and use.

⭐ Stelle: 104598

🍴 Forks: 7791

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: app apple application apps awesome awesome-list awesome-lists awesome-mac desktop-app desktop-application desktop-apps list mac mac-osx macos macos-app macos-apps macosx software

📜 Licenza: Creative Commons Zero v1.0 Universal

⏰ Creato il: 2016-07-17T15:33:47Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-24T05:29:34Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: MonitorControl

📝 Repository: MonitorControl/MonitorControl
